{rhyme_ctx}{user_ctx}This is an educator→poet revision pass. You were trained to revise under constraint: implement the instructions with minimal surface change elsewhere.

Rules:
- Lines not implicated by the instructions should stay word-for-word unless a rhyme fix in one line forces a tiny adjustment in an adjacent line.
- If rhyme errors are listed, fix those end-words first; keep meaning and meter as close as you can.
- Do not add a new title, commentary, or apology.

Output ONLY the full revised poem (entire text), not a diff.
